summary: {"type":"founder_review","decision":"request_changes","comments":["PR #30 created five foundational frontend files (index.html, styles.css, app.js, README.md, and tests/validate-foundation.mjs) under app/frontend. The Gemini review confirms a semantic dashboard structure and responsive breakpoints have been successfully implemented."],"risks":["Persistent state needs to be added, browser alerts must be replaced with in-UI feedback, keyboard focus-visible styling is required, possible duplicate click listeners should be removed, and the external placeholder Duey image must be replaced."],"nextAction":"Send the five verified corrections back to Codex before Founder approval."}
